title: psiadia pollicina
intro: Psiadia pollicina is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the island of Réunion in the Indian Ocean. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Psiadia pollicina include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function and wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, and can also be used in herbal remedies such as salves and ointments to treat skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
